question: Hello
answer: Hello! I am the Student Support AI. How can I help you today?

question: Thank you
answer: You are very welcome! Let me know if you have any other questions.

question: Who are you
answer: I am an AI student support assistant designed to help concordia students with university-related questions.

question: How do I reset my concordia account password?
answer: Visit the IT portal and select Forgot Password.

question: Where is the registrar office located?
answer: The registrar office is located in GM building.

question: How do I pay my tuition and other fees?
answer: All fees can be paid online through the finance portal using a credit card or bank transfer.

question: How do I contact technical support?
answer: You can email IT@Concordia.ca or call the IT help desk(Number will be found on the website).

question: What are the library hours of operation?
answer: The library is open from 9 AM to 10 PM every day.

question: How do I register for classes and courses?
answer: Log into the student portal and open the course registration section under Academics.

question: How do I drop or add a course?
answer: You can modify your course enrollment through the student portal during the official add/drop period.

question: How can I apply for scholarships and financial aid?
answer: Visit AFE Quebec website.

question: Where can I find my class schedule?
answer: Your class schedule is available in your student portal under “My Courses”.

question: How do I get a new student ID card?
answer: Visit the campus security office with a valid government photo ID to request your student card.

question: Where can I find academic advising and counselors?
answer: Academic advising is available at the Student Success Centre in Hall Building.

question: How do I request an official transcript?
answer: You can request both official and unofficial transcripts through the registrar office website.

question: How do I connect to campus Wi-Fi or internet?
answer: Select the campus Wi-Fi network and log in using your student email and password.

question: How do I book an appointment with an advisor?
answer: Use the online booking system on the Student Success Centre website.

question: What should I do if I feel stressed or overwhelmed?
answer: You can contact the campus wellness center for free counseling and mental health support.

question: What should I do if I feel happy?
answer: You can share that happyiness with others at the campus wellness center.

question: How do I apply for graduation?
answer: Submit a graduation application through the registrar office portal before the semester deadline.

question: Where can I find internship or job opportunities?
answer: Check the career center website for job postings and internship listings.

question: How do I update my personal information or address?
answer: You can update your contact details in the student portal under “Profile”.

question: Where can I get help with school work or any other assignments?
answer: Visit the writing center located in the library for tutoring support.

question: How do I access online learning materials or Moodle?
answer: Your course materials are available on the university learning management system.

question: How do I go to school?
answer: You can attend classes in person on campus or access them online through the learning management system.

question: How do I access my student email?
answer: You can log in using your Netname and password through the university email portal.

question: How do I change my program or major?
answer: Submit a program change request through your student portal under Academic Requests.

question: How do I check my tuition balance?
answer: You can view your balance in the student finance section of your portal.

question: How do I apply for a student loan?
answer: Visit the financial aid website and follow the student loan application instructions.

question: Where can I find campus maps?
answer: Campus maps are available on the university website under Campus Information.

question: How do I appeal a grade?
answer: You can submit a grade appeal form through the registrar office within the allowed deadline.

question: How do I request a course override?
answer: Contact your department advisor to request a course override.

question: How do I get help with math or science courses?
answer: Visit the tutoring center located in the library for academic support.

question: How do I join student clubs?
answer: You can browse and join clubs through the student life portal.

question: How do I get a parking permit?
answer: Parking permits can be purchased online through the campus parking services website.

question: How do I report a lost item?
answer: Visit the campus security office or check the lost and found page online.

question: How do I update my emergency contact?
answer: You can update emergency contacts in your student portal under Personal Information.

question: How do I access my tax forms?
answer: Tax forms are available in the finance section of your student portal.

question: How do I request disability accommodations?
answer: Contact the Access Centre for Students with Disabilities to schedule an appointment.

question: How do I check my graduation requirements?
answer: You can view your program requirements in the degree audit section of your portal.

question: How do I pay international student fees?
answer: International students can pay through the online portal using credit card, bank transfer, or Flywire.

question: How do I get a letter of enrollment?
answer: You can request an enrollment verification letter through the registrar office website.

question: How do I access the gym or fitness center?
answer: You can use your student ID to access the campus gym.

question: How do I reset my student portal password?
answer: Use the “Forgot Password” option on the login page to reset your password.

question: How do I contact campus security?
answer: You can call the campus security hotline or visit their office in the main building.

question: How do I get help with mental health?
answer: You can book free counseling sessions at the campus wellness center.

question: How do I check if a course is full?
answer: You can see course availability in the course registration system.

question: How do I join online classes?
answer: Through eConcordia.

question: How do I get my student ID replaced?
answer: Visit the security office and request a replacement card for a small fee.

question: How do I apply for co-op?
answer: Visit the co-op office website and follow the application steps for your program.

question: How do I find research opportunities?
answer: Check with your department or visit the undergraduate research office.

question: How do I contact my professor?
answer: You can find your professors email on the course outline or department website.

question: How do I access recorded lectures?
answer: Recorded lectures are available on moodle.

question: How do I check my assignment deadlines?
answer: Assignment deadlines are listed on moodle.

question: How do I get help with writing essays?
answer: Visit the writing center for free academic writing support.
